calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jan-24-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Patrick Heard, #11055.
David Pinch, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff: GMAC LLC f/k/a General Motors Acceptance Corporation.
No appearance by Defendant: Charlie Walker.

Order re: waiver of appearance by witness filed - 11/19/07.
Default entered against Defendant - 01/04/08.
Doe Defendants dismissed - 01/04/08.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Charlie Walker as follows:
Damages/Principal $40,618.90
Prejudgment Interest $765.74
Attorney's Fees $500.00 for a total of $41,884.64.
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2007 Continued To Feb-08-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
